calls.content:
### Work Breakdown Structure
* Review Collection Feature
  * Design UI for review submission form (2 person days)
  * Implement backend API to store reviews (4 person days)
  * Integrate API with frontend review submission form (3 person days)
* Review Moderation Feature
  * Design UI for review moderation dashboard (2 person days)
  * Implement backend logic for review moderation (3 person days)
  * Integrate moderation dashboard with backend (3 person days)
* Average Rating Display
  * Calculate average rating on product page (2 person days)
  * Display average rating on product page (1 person day)
  * Update average rating in real-time after moderation (2 person days)
* Testing and Quality Assurance
  * Write unit tests for review submission and moderation (3 person days)
  * Perform integration testing for review feature (4 person days)

### Total Estimate
Total estimate: 24 person days

### Assumptions
* The development team is familiar with the existing e-commerce platform's technology stack.
* The design team will provide necessary assets (e.g., icons, images) for the review submission form and moderation dashboard.
* The existing product page template can be modified to display the average rating.
* The review feature will not require significant changes to the existing database schema.
* Testing will be performed on a staging environment that mirrors production.
